Class OpenAiImageProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.AbstractOpenAiProperties
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.OpenAiImageProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.openai.image") public class OpenAiImageProperties extends AbstractOpenAiProperties
OpenAI SDK Image autoconfiguration properties.
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, lambochen
